dataset: AIRED instruction->implementation pairs (v2: per-file/hunk split of large changes)
format: JSONL {"messages":[{user},{assistant}]}; user=shared context (+ 'implement change to <path>' for split pairs), assistant=that file/hunk diff

rules.split: units >150L split per file; file >150L kept whole iff single coherent change/new-file (<=400L) else split by hunk (hunks packed up to 150L); single file/hunk >400L dropped
